news.t: PMV Capital Advisers, LLC Celebrates Successful Third Anniversary of the PMV Adaptive Risk Parity ETF (NYSE Arca: ARP)
PMV Capital Advisers, LLC Has Announced the Launch of the PMV Adaptive Risk Parity ETF (NYSE Arca: ARP)

overview.description: The PMV Adaptive Risk Parity ETF (ARP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in global macro alternatives. The fund is an actively managed fund-of-funds that allocates to a variety of asset classes: global equities, fixed-income securities, commodities, and currencies based on risk parity. ARP was launched on Dec 21, 2022 and is issued by PMV.
